title: Starting Epson RC+ 8.0 specifying the language
description:
Starting Epson RC+ 8.0 specifying the language

Starting Epson RC+ 8.0 specifying the language

You can specify the language to use in Epson RC+ 8.0 GUI.

Japanese	Japanese:
		 erc80.EXE  /LANG_JAPANESE *1

English	English: erc80.EXE  /LANG_ENGLISH

German	German: erc80.EXE  /LANG_GERMAN
		 *2

French	French: erc80.EXE  /LANG_FRENCH
		 *2

Spanish	Spanish: erc80.EXE  /LANG_SPANISH
		 *2

Chinese (Simplified)	Chinese (Simplified):
		 erc80.EXE  /LANG_CHINESE_SIMP *3

Chinese (Traditional)	Chinese (Traditional):
		 erc80.EXE  /LANG_CHINESE_TRAD *3

*1 Available for Japanese OS

*2 Available for English, German, French, and Spanish OS

*3 Available for Chinese OS

NOTE:  The language specified at startup is a temporary setting. To set this by default, in the RC+ menu, set the language in [Setup]-[Preferences]-[Language Preferences]. For details, refer to the section 5.13.3 [Preferences] (Setup menu) - [Setup]-[Preferences]-[Language Preferences].
